name: Bagels - Dg
recipeInstructions: DG Bread Machine Cookbook 160 Let machine knead dough once, then let dough rise 20 min. only in machine. Even if cycle runs longer, simply remove dough after 20 minutes and turn off machine. Divide dough into appropriate number of pieces. Each piece should be placed on well greased baking sheet, cover & let rise only 15 to 20 minutes. Meanwhile, bring to slight boil in a nonaluminum pan (Donna uses cast iron frying pan), about 2 inches of water. Carefully lower about 3 or 4 bagels at a time into water, carefully turn with spatula so as not to break them, then bake for approximately 5 minutes per side until golden brown and cooked through. Remove from water and place on paper towels to drain excess oil before serving.
